notes: Full screen full HD, video presets High, skirmish played, no issue. Steel Division 2 Beta version 60103684
title: Steel Division 2

notes: The games runs somewhat smoothly, approximately like the first Steel Division, but noticeably less smoother that on Windows. I would say it's perfectly playable but there's one game breaking details, in a 15 minutes or so into the game the cursor disappears entirely which is obviously unacceptable. Provided this problem is solved the game is good to go.
title: Steel Division 2

notes:
Cursor becomes invisible around (roughly) 15 minutes of game-play meaning the game has to be restarted.

What I tried to fix it:

1. Disabled steam overlay.
2. Ran game in fullscreen (not fullscreen-widowed).

This seems to be a worsened carry-over issue from Steel Division 1 where the cursor changed to the system cursor around about the same time.
title: Steel Division 2

notes: Everything runs fine except for the cursor issues. However after a bit of testing a work around is to run the game in widowed mode and turn off mousetrap in game play options. Otherwise runs very well.
title: Steel Division 2

notes: Run without problem with Proton 3.16-4. I have observe the cursor becoming invisible (but still working) only with Proton 4.2-5. Steel Division 2 Beta v20403
title: Steel Division 2

notes: Works perfectly when run in windowed mode to avoid the disappearing cursor bug.
title: Steel Division 2

notes:
Still disappearing cursor issue when played full screen. Cursor is still here but invisible! Tweak is to play it windowed.
Also, intro videos tend to freeze the game. Tweak is to hit ESC key as soon as video starts. 
Other than that, game runs smoothly.
title: Steel Division 2
